highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Sher-I-Kashmir Institute of Medical Sciences:

faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

faqs.question: Which Nursing job profile is highly paid?
faqs.answer:
Highest Nursing job is Senior Staff Nurse.
They manage junior staff nurses and Nursing students to make sure patients get best care. 
These nurses are give nursing care to such patients.

faqs.question: Which subject is best for MSc Nursing?
faqs.answer:
There are various forms of nursing, and if you want to become a Nurse in one of the many sectors, you will need particular certifications, some of which you may earn by studying a variety of vital subjects. The following are examples:
Biology
Chemistry
Physics
Applied Science
Health and Social Care
Psychology
Sociology
Physical Education

faqs.question: How many seats are available at Sher-I-Kashmir Institute of Medical Sciences for all courses combined?
faqs.answer: The overall seats available across all courses offered by Sher-I-Kashmir Institute of Medical Sciences is up to 386. Good thing to know is that Sher-I-Kashmir Institute of Medical Sciences has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like NMC, INC.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: All the alumni of this college are doing jobs no one is jobless.

review_content.Placements: Nursing students passed from this college get private jobs easily due to the college being affiliated with a tertiary care hospital, SKIMS Soura. You can apply for staff nurse positions through JKSSB and for AIIMS through NORCET. Internships are done at SKIMS Hospital Soura with proper guidance from tutors and staff.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. Hostel facilities are only for girls, costing 1500 per month. I can't tell you much about the hostel; it is for girls and named Habba Khatokn Hostel. Meals prepared are average in taste. Wi-Fi is available in college, along with a library, computer lab, and demonstration lab.

faqs.question: Q: How many seats are available at Sher-I-Kashmir Institute of Medical Sciences for all courses combined?

faqs.answer: Sher-I-Kashmir Institute of Medical Sciences offers Degree and Diploma courses including 3 UG and 23 PG courses. Additionally, it also has Advanced Masters courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Sher-I-Kashmir Institute of Medical Sciences has specializations such as DM specializations in Cardiology, Endocrinology, Gastroenterology, Neurology, Oncology, Nephrology, Haematology, Pulmonary Medicine, M.Ch. specializations in Cardiology, Neurology, Pediatrics, Plastic Surgery, Urology, Gastroenterology, PG Diploma specializations in Anaesthesia, Immunology, MD specializations in Anaesthesia, Dermatology, General Medicine, Hospital / Healthcare Management, Microbiology, Pediatrics, Pathology, Psychiatry, Radiology, Radiotherapy, Community Medicine, MS specializations in Obstetrics & Gynecology, Ophthalmology, General Surgery, Orthopaedics.

overview_faqs.question: What are the career-related benefits of pursuing MSc in Nursing?
overview_faqs.answer: An MSc in Nursing opens doors to leadership, specialization and also higher pay in jobs like Nurse Manager, Educator or Clinical Specialist allowing one to teach, conduct research or also manage healthcare teams. This all happens while one gains advanced skills for patient care and better job options.

cut_off.college_name: Sher-I-Kashmir Institute of Medical Sciences Cutoff 2025: Check NEET UG Round Wise Ranks

description: Sher-I-Kashmir Institute of Medical Sciences cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Sher-I-Kashmir Institute of Medical Sciences NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 13034 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Sher-I-Kashmir Institute of Medical Sciences MBBS cutoff 2025 was 13034 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 17981 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Sher-I-Kashmir Institute of Medical Sciences accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Sher-I-Kashmir Institute of Medical Sciences NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MS. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category was 13994. According to this range, the most competitive course is MS. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Sher-I-Kashmir Institute of Medical Sciences MS cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisation for the General AI category was MS in General Surgery. The round 4 closing rank for this specialisation was 13994.
Students can refer to the table below to know NEET PG cutoffs across different categories, courses, and years.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

Sher-I-Kashmir Institute of Medical Sciences NEET SS Cutoff 2024 was released for the concluding round in the form of ranks for admission to DM, M.Ch. courses across multiple specialisations. The cutoff was released for various categories belonging to the AI quota.
In the first round, Sher-I-Kashmir Institute of Medical Sciences DM cutoff 2024 ranged from 76 to 1029 for students in the General AI category. was the toughest to get into. turned ou

For more in-depth details for the previous year cutoffs, please refer to the table provided below and make use of the filters available to refine your search on the basis of rounds and category.

highlights.summary:
The NEET MDS 2026 exam date has been set as May 2, 2026 (tentatively) for Index Institute of Dental Sciences admission to the MDS course. The registrations for the same are expected to start soon.

A few more updates are given below:

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied because of its faculty members and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Placements were not provided at our college. In this course, students lack the necessary practical knowledge and skills required to do clinical practice.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our infrastructure was not good. The food served at the hostel was not decent. The library was good. Wi-Fi was not available on campus.
review_content.Faculty: Our professors were very helpful and knowledgeable. Our course curriculum was relevant. The semester exams were moderate. The professional exams were conducted very well.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty members are helpful, have good infrastructure and facilities and are assured jobs.

review_content.Placements: It's a medical field, so it depends on the amount of time and work you have dedicated to your studies that will decide your future. The package is as per your qualifications. Starting as an intern or fresh graduate, you can get up to 10 LPA to 20 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has well-equipped labs. Each classroom has all facilities like air-conditioning, fans, projectors, etc. College has a good supply of books in the library. College hostel has all the facilities to have a good living. Food quality is average in mess. Food is given four times—breakfast, lunch, snakes and dinner. It is a deemed university, so has medical college, dental college and all medical field colleges. So, being a hospital itself, it has good medical facilities.

overview_faqs.question: Is Index Institute of Dental Sciences worth considering?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Index Institute of Dental Sciences are BDS, MDS. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Index Institute of Dental Sciences has a rating of 3.1 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 3, 2.3, 4 and 3.3 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: Index Institute of Dental Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college provides good satisfaction in placements.

content.Placements: If you are doing video then you do not get placement in BDS and in that we get clinical jobs and we can earn as much as you want from our own clinic. It is not that no one gets it. If we think of getting a job in it then we can easily get a job in any hospital or college but we do not get that much money in it.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is quite good and classrooms are also good. The library is also available. Restaurants are also good and I think the food here is also okay. Security is taken care of in the hostel. There are CCTV cameras all around and ragging does not take place here. The campus is completely ragging-free and has a separate basketball court. A gym is also available for dental students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college is average, but there are no extra facilities.

content.Placements: Our college does not provide placements. A one-year internship is mandatory for all students after completing the course. The medical college does not give placements. This is the only disadvantage of choosing a medical field. After finishing the course, you must decide what to do next for yourself.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has excellent facilities and infrastructure. The hostel mess food is not good. The campus is good, but it is outside the city. Our hostel rooms are good, but no extra facilities are provided like Wi-Fi, coolers, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied because of its faculty members and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Placements were not provided at our college. In this course, students lack the necessary practical knowledge and skills required to do clinical practice.
content.Infrastructure: Our infrastructure was not good. The food served at the hostel was not decent. The library was good. Wi-Fi was not available on campus.
content.Faculty: Our professors were very helpful and knowledgeable. Our course curriculum was relevant. The semester exams were moderate. The professional exams were conducted very well.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are helpful, have good infrastructure and facilities and are assured jobs.

content.Placements: It's a medical field, so it depends on the amount of time and work you have dedicated to your studies that will decide your future. The package is as per your qualifications. Starting as an intern or fresh graduate, you can get up to 10 LPA to 20 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has well-equipped labs. Each classroom has all facilities like air-conditioning, fans, projectors, etc. College has a good supply of books in the library. College hostel has all the facilities to have a good living. Food quality is average in mess. Food is given four times—breakfast, lunch, snakes and dinner. It is a deemed university, so has medical college, dental college and all medical field colleges. So, being a hospital itself, it has good medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good environment in terms of learning, growing, and connectivity.

content.Placements: Placements were good. Industry connection and practical training empowered students with real-world skills. Graduates benefit from a high placement rate, securing opportunities in top dental clinics and healthcare institutions. This college was committed to student's success.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities were good. It also provided state-of-the-art laboratories. Classrooms were well-maintained. Digital resources were available to enhance the learning environment. Our campus was well-designed with modern amenities. It also provided a conducive space for academic growth and practical skills.

Index Institute of Dental Sciences course admissions are done based on entrance and merit depending on the course. The university accepts applications in offline mode only. Students can pursue UG and PG programmes in fields of Medicine and Health Sciences, and more. To know about the eligibility of Index Institute of Dental Sciences courses, students can visit the website.

college_info.college_name: Shree Narayan Medical Institute and Hospital: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

review_content.General: Classrooms, lecture theatre, library, and some of the labs are fully air-conditioned. Wi-Fi quality is average. The hostel is average. Small rooms with a water problem, which get flooded in the rainy season, but you can survive for the sake of your MBBS degree. Food available in the mess is below average, just to keep you alive. The food is tasteless. Milk is given only once a day. Chapatis are dry, and the food is gone before its time. Canteen food is average even after paying. Medical facilities are average, as there is 1 hospital on campus, but you won't get treatment for free as a student. Sports and games facilities are under development.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Not good but it is what it is.

review_content.Placements: Not a single batch has passed, so no comment on that. And in MBBS, there is nothing to talk about in terms of placement, like engineering, so let's just skip this part for now. And this whole thing comes down to your job, as you have to study on your own.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is way underdeveloped—nothing much, just some buildings here and there—but progress is still there so there could be a decent college after 5 to 8 years. Currently, the college is under construction; the rooms are decent—not much astonishing—but I hope the infrastructure improves.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: A good college to take admission in.

review_content.Placements: Since we are the first batch and have not yet graduated, there is no idea about placements. However, I would say that this quality education, when the time for placements comes, is really going to help all the students to get placed well.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and buildings are still in progress as the college is new, and some buildings are yet to be completed. The hostels that are ready are quite good, with good Wi-Fi. The lecture halls are also very good, with good lighting, spaciousness, Wi-Fi, and comfort.

individual_reviews.title: My Experience at SNMIH so far.

content.Placements: So far, no batch has passed out, so no tangible data is present. Secondly, there are no direct MBBS placements as doctors are supposed to continue their studies after the UG course and join a PG branch for further expertise or set up a clinic. So, campus placements are really not a medical thing.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is really poor for the tuition fee. We weren't provided even a cadaver for 1st-year dissection. There are no AC practical classrooms. The LT is good though. Now, coming to sports, there is literally nothing to keep your head sane. Just an unmaintained so-called football ground run over by JCBs and the poorest sub-Saharan quality basketball court.

content.Placements: Since we are the first batch and have not yet graduated, there is no idea about placements. However, I would say that this quality education, when the time for placements comes, is really going to help all the students to get placed well.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and buildings are still in progress as the college is new, and some buildings are yet to be completed. The hostels that are ready are quite good, with good Wi-Fi. The lecture halls are also very good, with good lighting, spaciousness, Wi-Fi, and comfort.

content.Placements: My course is MBBS. Students get placed in some hospital or they are hired by the college for the hospital in the college. Students get internships at the college by the end of their fourth year. They get paid for it too, with a minimum of 15k per month. We are placed as junior doctors.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is currently not top-notch due to its under construction. The college is still under construction as it is a new college. The hostels are decent but not very aesthetic. The quality of the food provided is decent too. Hostels and the campus have wi-fi.

reviews.review_heading: My Experience at SNMIH so far.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is really poor for the tuition fee. We weren't provided even a cadaver for 1st-year dissection. There are no AC practical classrooms. The LT is good though. Now, coming to sports, there is literally nothing to keep your head sane. Just an unmaintained so-called football ground run over by JCBs and the poorest sub-Saharan quality basketball court.

reviews.review_heading: Average college, but at least you can get an MBBS degree at a lower fee compared to other colleges.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms, lecture theatre, library, and some of the labs are fully air-conditioned. Wi-Fi quality is average. The hostel is average. Small rooms with a water problem, which get flooded in the rainy season, but you can survive for the sake of your MBBS degree. Food available in the mess is below average, just to keep you alive. The food is tasteless. Milk is given only once a day. Chapatis are dry, and the food is gone before its time. Canteen food is average even after paying. Medical faciliti...

reviews.review_heading: Not good but it is what it is.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is way underdeveloped—nothing much, just some buildings here and there—but progress is still there so there could be a decent college after 5 to 8 years. Currently, the college is under construction; the rooms are decent—not much astonishing—but I hope the infrastructure improves.

reviews.review_heading: A good college to take admission in.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and buildings are still in progress as the college is new, and some buildings are yet to be completed. The hostels that are ready are quite good, with good Wi-Fi. The lecture halls are also very good, with good lighting, spaciousness, Wi-Fi, and comfort.

reviews.review_heading: Don't come here, if you have good marks.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is currently not top-notch due to its under construction. The college is still under construction as it is a new college. The hostels are decent but not very aesthetic. The quality of the food provided is decent too. Hostels and the campus have wi-fi.

reviews.review_heading: Average college, developing infrastructure and supportive teachers.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average. No auditorium or playground. Hostels are good although still need work. Mess is okay and they have a shop inside campus for basic necessities like soaps and stationary etc. There is also a canteen for momos n chowmein etc. Library definitely needs help. Overall since the college is new it's okay but in future there is scope for improvement.

reviews.review_heading: Decent enough to survive.
reviews.review_text: Only infrastructure that is decent enough is the Lecture Theater; other than that, mess, cafeteria, and other facilities’ infrastructure is just in barely usable condition. We face day-to-day problems with our basic infrastructure requirements like water and others.

review_content.Placements: Every year about 60% of students from our course get placed. The highest and the lowest salary package offered depends upon your interview and the firm. The average salary offered is Rs. 40,000 per month. We mainly get a dairy farm, poultry farm firms, Suguna Chicken and Ponlait dairy farms to get placed. Our college provides internships in different places starting from different veterinary colleges, dispensaries in and around Pondicherry and one month in dairy farms and followed by feed mills. Roles like an assistant veterinary officer, veterinary doctor and also inspector at the slaughterhouse are offered to the students.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college fee structure is high and placements are not provided.

review_content.Placements: Placements were not provided in our college. They just provided their references to a particular firm.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was very good and small but they manage things properly like labs and medical facilities. A hostel was not available in our college as there were no outsiders. The gym was available in our college.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college were very good. The teaching was very good. Exams were conducted to test a student's ability.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: B.A.M.S. at Ideal College of Ayurveda.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not assured, as it is a medical field. You have to search for yourself. An internship is provided in the college itself. You get the best experience of practical knowledge that you need most in every possible way. You find improvement in yourself.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good. The canteen, mess, and gym make it a very nice campus in many ways. The canteen does not have many options, but you are okay with the options available. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel as well as in the college in some places. Improvement is visible.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and well-educated teachers. Big campus with herbal garden.

review_content.Placements: 80 percent students are placed in our course. 30 to 50 thousand packages are given to the students for the first placement. 50 percent students are offered this package at least. Guidance and knowledge of good communication skills are better for future.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very big. There are separate hostels for girls and boys. There is B.A.M.S., Engineering, Pharmacy, B. Pharma, D. Pharma, and Nursing departments available for students. Big classrooms and seminar halls, everything is much better. .

faqs.answer: Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.
faqs.question: Q: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?

faqs.answer: The best choice depends on your career aspirations:· If you want to become a teacher: Opt for a B.Ed. It's the mandatory qualification for teaching in most schools.· If you want to pursue a career in research or a science-related field: A BSc would be more suitable. It provides a strong foundation for further studies and specialised careers.· If you're unsure: Consider your interests and skills. Do you enjoy teaching and interacting with students? Or are you more drawn to scientific exploration and research? Additional options:· M.Ed.: If you already have a B.Ed., you can pursue a Master of Education for career advancement or specialisation in a particular teaching area.· Diploma courses: Various specialised Diploma courses in education or related fields can enhance your skills and knowledge.

answer.text: A career in media industry requires commitment, dedication and sacrifice of personal time for the sake of staying on front or top, particularly in news industry. A journalist may have to work day in and day out to get breaking news. Similarly, media professionals who are in entertainment or film making need to work with passion which may come at the cost of their personal life. However, in a nutshell, Bachelor of Journalism and Mass Communication degree is enough for a person to fetch a job of any interest in the media field.Few of the areas s/he can choose from, include:TV channelsCirculation and Public RelationsCentral Information ServiceLegal Affairs DepartmentJournalsAIR - All India RadioNews AgenciesPress Information BureauAdvertising agenciesBroadcasting companies.Hopefully, the above information will help you make an informed decision.

overview_faqs.question: Is Ideal College worth considering?
overview_faqs.answer: Ideal College is a prestigious institution that offers B.Sc, BBM/BMS, B.Com, B.M.M, D.Ed, B.Pharma, D.Pharma programs. Students have the option to enroll in these courses to start their careers in the Science, Business & Management Studies, Accounting & Commerce, Mass Communication & Media, Teaching & Education, Medicine & Health Sciences field. The institute is renowned for its dedicated and experienced faculty members who are committed to delivering these programs. Ideal College has earned a remarkable review rating of 3.2 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Furthermore, it has received ratings of 3 for Campus Life, 2 for Placements, 4 for Faculty, and 4 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Ideal College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Accounting and Finance (BAF) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Strict faculty members and punishing students.

content.Placements: This campus had less placements. Average package of the companies to hire students and also had some internships from the course. Some other companies students were placed in some other companies. They were happy with their jobs in the organisation.
content.Infrastructure: More infrastructure and facilities were there. Students found it easy to understand the concepts of the courses. More infrastructure or facilities that the students were easy to understand the concept of courses like labs, library, classrooms, etc. It's also good and understandable for the students. Also had some infrastructure and facilities like labs, and digital screening.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college fee structure is high and placements are not provided.

content.Placements: Placements were not provided in our college. They just provided their references to a particular firm.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was very good and small but they manage things properly like labs and medical facilities. A hostel was not available in our college as there were no outsiders. The gym was available in our college.
content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college were very good. The teaching was very good. Exams were conducted to test a student's ability.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: B.A.M.S. at Ideal College of Ayurveda.

content.Placements: Placements are not assured, as it is a medical field. You have to search for yourself. An internship is provided in the college itself. You get the best experience of practical knowledge that you need most in every possible way. You find improvement in yourself.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good. The canteen, mess, and gym make it a very nice campus in many ways. The canteen does not have many options, but you are okay with the options available. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel as well as in the college in some places. Improvement is visible.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and well-educated teachers. Big campus with herbal garden.

content.Placements: 80 percent students are placed in our course. 30 to 50 thousand packages are given to the students for the first placement. 50 percent students are offered this package at least. Guidance and knowledge of good communication skills are better for future.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very big. There are separate hostels for girls and boys. There is B.A.M.S., Engineering, Pharmacy, B. Pharma, D. Pharma, and Nursing departments available for students. Big classrooms and seminar halls, everything is much better. .

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied, and faculty members are good but need to be changed some. However, they are helpful.

content.Placements: About 80% of the students got placed from our college. Our college is under government, but the college fee is approximately Rs. 12,000, while the hostel fee is Rs. 7,000. The mess fee is Rs. 2,500 per month. None of the companies visits our college for placements. Our college works hard and provides us with high internships, and the stipend is offered only by Andhra Pradesh government. After UG, we pursue PG.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good here but not up to the mark, and there will be dirty in some places. However, labs are well-equipped, and the outpatient flow to the college is good so that we learn much work. The quality of the hostel is somewhat bad, and the food is available in the outside mess. The canteen is small, and medical facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college, and I am highly satisfied.

content.Placements: Students should score an average of 70% of marks in their academics to get placed. Most of the students secured PG seats after completion of UG course. Many conferences are conducted in college for the overall development of the student. All the students got an internship and got a scholarship after every year in UG.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good, and the campus is huge and lush green. The library is very peaceful, and all the departments are equipped With labs. There is a playground for cricket, volleyball, football, and shuttle court are provided in both boys and girls hostels. There are 24 hours of free supply of Ro mineral water.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied, and faculty members are good but need to be changed some. However, they are helpful.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good here but not up to the mark, and there will be dirty in some places. However, labs are well-equipped, and the outpatient flow to the college is good so that we learn much work. The quality of the hostel is somewhat bad, and the food is available in the outside mess. The canteen is small, and medical facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college, and I am highly satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good, and the campus is huge and lush green. The library is very peaceful, and all the departments are equipped With labs. There is a playground for cricket, volleyball, football, and shuttle court are provided in both boys and girls hostels. There are 24 hours of free supply of Ro mineral water.

reviews.review_heading: Government dental college kadapa.
reviews.review_text:
1. our college has good lab facilities with lot of equipment in good condition and classrooms are nice and teaching in projectors for better understanding. Our college has library working from morning 8 to night 8. 
2. Hostel is nice two numbers for room, food is adjustable, medical facility is available 24 hours. Sports and games are given important role.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is very excellent in my college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was excellent in my college. Wi-Fi available, labs are excellent, classrooms are majority filling with 100s of students, library present. In library the books are arranged in the form of department wise so it can easily to take books for required subject.

reviews.review_heading: Extremely good no government college can match us.
reviews.review_text:
1)college is good all facilities are up to mark. Good classroom, clean hospital, heavy patients inflow
Library and labs also available for students good faculty? 
2) hostel is good with good climate surroundings. Food is average. Canteen is available in both hostel and college, sports and games also encouraged.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Labs are available for practical purposes. Classrooms are clean and neat. Library is available with all types of textbooks and materials. Wi-Fi connection is available. Medical facilities and a canteen are available in the hostel. The food served is good.

highlights.summary:
The NEET MDS 2026 application process has commenced for Jaipur Dental College admission to the MDS course, with Mar 30, 2026, being the last date to register. Also, the NEET MDS exam 2026 is going to be held on May 2, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: It's the best private dental college in Jaipur with good patient flow.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement for BDS students because generally, no college provides placement facilities for BDS dentistry. However, you need to do a compulsory rotatory internship for 13 months, and you gain a lot of experience during that time. You can learn as much as you want during that year.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is decent with necessary amenities. Wi-Fi is available, and there are good lecture rooms. The hospital is attached to the college itself, which is a big plus point. You get to see many things. They have a nice, big library, and the canteen is decent too and not very expensive.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good faculty members.

review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not good. The hostel facilities are below average. The food served in the mess is below average. Our college connectivity to the city is distant. Medical facilities are provided in the hospital which is present in our college.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are highly qualified but they are not cooperative. The pass percentage is average. They provide practical knowledge with personal attention. Pre-clinical are given with appropriate attention. Exams are conducted annually. Mid-semester exams are conducted regularly.

Silver Oak College of Pharmacy popular programmes are Dpharma and BPharma. Students willing to opt for a long-term career in the Medical field of Pharmaceutical Science can join these courses. Students can start their careers in the Pharmaceutical Industry after completing their education at this college. The following are the USPs of joining Silver Oak College of Pharmacy:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Silver Oak College of Pharmacy offers UG and diploma courses to students. At the UG level, the college offers BPharma courses to students. The college also provides diploma courses to students. BPharma students are taught Human Anatomy and Physiology, Remedial Biology, Remedial Mathematics, and various subjects as a part of the course curriculum. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Silver Oak College of Pharmacy and their respective eligibility and Silver Oak College of Pharmacy fee:

faqs.answer: A:    The course fees for the Silver Oak College of Pharmacy BPharm course is currently unknown for the academic year 2026. Last year, the four year BPharm fees at Silver Oak College of Pharmacy was INR 4.2 lakh. The aforementioned fees was charged in four equal instalments of INR 1.05 Lacs each.
faqs.question: What is the course fees for four years BPharm at Silver Oak College of Pharmacy?

faqs.answer: A:    Applicants need to complete Class 12 with Science stream to apply for Silver Oak College of Pharmacy BPharma. After fulfilling the eligibility criteria, candidates are required to fill the application form by visiting the official website of Silver Oak University.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BPharma at Silver Oak College of Pharmacy?

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fee for Silver Oak College of Pharmacy of BPharma is INR 3 lakh. Applicants are required to pay a course fee at the time of admission to lock their seat in the college. Besides, aspirants also need to pay a non-refundable application fee of INR 500 to apply for a course.
faqs.question: What is the total fee of the BPharma course offered by Silver Oak College of Pharmacy?

individual_reviews.title: Best college for D.Pharm students.

content.Placements: There's a 60 percent chance of getting placements in any course for general category students. Very easy, simple, and predictable process with minimal issues. You can choose any college at all because they have provided all the necessary instruments and have been maintained.
content.Infrastructure: The department has well-equipped classrooms, labs, Wi-Fi, and a good library that supports learning. Hostel facilities are clean and secure. individual_reviews.title: Silver Days of Silver Oak

content.Placements: In our college, a minimum of 40% of students can get placement in companies like Glaxo and Intas. The highest package we can get is 300,000 per year, while the lowest is 220,000 per year. In my course, the top roles available are as Medical Representatives in pharmacy.
content.Infrastructure: In my course, we get lab facilities, which are very important for students. We gain valuable knowledge from these labs, as they help us perform every experiment practically. I haven’t stayed in the hostel, but some of my friends have, and they report having a nice experience and feel good about it.

college_info.intro:
SASTRA Deemed University Thanjavur, offers undergraduate, integrated first degree, postgraduate, and doctoral programmes across multiple fields including Engineering, Science, Law, Commerce, Management, and Fine Arts. BTech, MTech and MBA are the popular courses offered by SASTRA Thanjavur. The undergraduate engineering courses (BTech) offered by the SASTRA Deemed University Thanjavur, are offered for four years. Some of the popular BTech specialisations offered at SASTRA University Thanjavur, are mentioned below:
The BTech programmes offered at the university are recognised by the Institution of Engineering & Technology (IET), UK and AICTE. The programmes are further accredited by the Institution of Engineers (India). Candidates can check some of the popular programmes offered at SASTRA University, along with the eligibility criteria and Sastra Thanjavur fees in this space:

placements.overview:
SASTRA University placement data for 2025 is currently not available and will be posted here once officially available. The NIRF Report for 2025 SASTRA University placements has been updated, according to which 2,154 students were successfully placed in various industry-leading names. Out of these, BTech graduates numbered at 1,621 with the median salary package being INR 7.60 LPA. Furthermore, 49 MTech graduates were placed with a median package of INR 5.50 LPA.

For the UG 3-year, 4-year, and 5-year courses, the students placed were 96, 63, and 101, respectively, with their median salaries being INR 3.80 LPA, INR 7.60 LPA, and INR 5.60 LPA, respectively. SASTRA students graduating from the PG 2-year program numbered 203, and their median salary was INR 4 LPA. Also, the PG 5-year integrated program counted a total of 21 students, with their median salary being INR 5.50 LPA. Below mentioned are the SASTRA University placements highlights:

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechatronics Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Best for students' careers.

review_content.Placements: 100 percent placement for students without backlog. The package is 6 to 24 LPA. Accenture, Comcast, PayPal, Amazon, Caterpillar, and many more companies recruit. Max of the role is a software engineer and technical support based only, and also in a product role, they are hiring.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure with the best classrooms and labs. Free Wi-Fi for only pc and laptops with some restrictions. In our hostel, there are 2 in 1, 3 in 1 and single rooms for both girls and boys, and also AC and non-AC rooms are available. 24/7, there is medical support on campus. Sports and games are there, but mainly focusing on academics only.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It’s overhyped, but still better than other colleges in our state.

review_content.Placements: In the past, a good percentage of students got placed. But now, due to the IT slowdown and the rise of AI, placements are not as high as before. Those who have enough knowledge of the subjects still have good opportunities. I am not blaming the college for this, but students are also lacking the basic required grip on the subjects.
review_content.Infrastructure: It is not up to the mark as they claim, like being a world class university. It is just average for the fees they collect from us. They can upgrade and provide a better environment for us. There is no need to change much. Just replace basic required things like benches for sitting and some basic infrastructure.

faqs.question: Q: How do I get a seat at SASTRA University?

faqs.answer: Yes, admission are open at SASTRA University. The university accepts admisison through online application. Interested students can apply directly through the official page. It is necessary to qualify the eligibility criteria as per the course.
faqs.question: Q: Is SASTRA University admission open?

faqs.answer: At the undergraduate level, this deemed University offers BTech across 30 specialisations along with Integrated MTech across two specialisations. Spread over four years and eight semesters, admission to BTech is possible at SASTRA Deemed University via two methods:Stream 1: JEE Mains + Class 12 marks (50% weightage given to each), for admission to 50% of the total seatsStream 2: Class 12 marks (100% weightage), for admission to the remaining 50%The following qualifications must be met by the students to secure admission to BTech at Sastra:Candidates must have obtained 60% aggregate in their Class 12 with Physics, Maths, Chemistry, Biotechnology, Computer Science, and Biology from a recognised board.Taken JEE Main exam
faqs.question: Q: Which entrance does a student need to clear to get admission to SASTRA Deemed University for BTech?

faqs.answer: There is no such provision for getting direct admission in any courses at SASTRA University. overview_faqs.question: What is the fee structure of SASTRA University for the MSc course?
overview_faqs.answer: The total course fee for the MSc course at SASTRA University ranges between INR 80,000 to INR 2 lakh. overview_faqs.question: Does Sastra University accept online payment?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Sastra University does accept online payment for admission and application to its courses. To pay the fee online candidates are required to visit the university's official website. The college accepts all the methods of online payment for fees such as Credit card, Debit card, UPI, Net banking and others.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees for MBA in SASTRA University?

The total tuition fee for MBA programme ranges between INR 1.6 lakh to 14 lakh. Candidates can refer to the SASTRA University official website for more details on the same.

review_summary.college_name: SASTRA University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Mathematics with Computer Applications - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I like my college much because everything goes well on campus and in my department.

content.Placements: 80% of students were placed in my course. IT, banking exam and government exam packages were offered in my course. Zoho, TCS, and Infosys were the top recruiting companies for my course. 90% of students got internships from my course in companies like TCS and Zoho. Data analyst, finance, and researcher roles were offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi labs to practice coding, a peaceful library, neat classrooms, and many more facilities were available in my department. Canteen foods were purely vegetarian and tasty, with enough food. Sports coaching was good, and indoor games were also available for a stress-free environment.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is a college that gives life.

content.Placements: Placements are good. The highest package reached 27 LPA, and the average packages are around 4 to 8 LPA. This indicates strong industry connections for engineering and technology students.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is limited, as the signal is often low. The campus offers robust infrastructure, including a green campus, modern labs, a library, sports facilities, a gym, a hospital, banks, and good transport. Hostel rooms are available in 2-sharing and some 4-sharing.
content.Faculty: There are three midterms, which are hectic. Professors are very experienced. Exams are rigorous, involving internal assessments and end-of-semester tests. Selection is typically based on merit in the JEE and intermediate examinations.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechatronics Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Best for students' careers.

content.Placements: 100 percent placement for students without backlog. The package is 6 to 24 LPA. Accenture, Comcast, PayPal, Amazon, Caterpillar, and many more companies recruit. Max of the role is a software engineer and technical support based only, and also in a product role, they are hiring.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure with the best classrooms and labs. Free Wi-Fi for only pc and laptops with some restrictions. In our hostel, there are 2 in 1, 3 in 1 and single rooms for both girls and boys, and also AC and non-AC rooms are available. 24/7, there is medical support on campus. Sports and games are there, but mainly focusing on academics only.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It’s overhyped, but still better than other colleges in our state.

content.Placements: In the past, a good percentage of students got placed. But now, due to the IT slowdown and the rise of AI, placements are not as high as before. Those who have enough knowledge of the subjects still have good opportunities. I am not blaming the college for this, but students are also lacking the basic required grip on the subjects.
content.Infrastructure: It is not up to the mark as they claim, like being a world class university. It is just average for the fees they collect from us. They can upgrade and provide a better environment for us. There is no need to change much. Just replace basic required things like benches for sitting and some basic infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: SASTRA University life is amazing where we can meet people from various parts.

content.Placements: More than 90 percent of the students get placed each year. The salary is Rs 50,000 per month or more. Recruiting companies are Tata and many reputed companies. Roles offered are TL, project manager, and back-end research. The internship opportunities are available even at the college, and long-term internships are also given based on your performance. Companies easily recruit people from this university.
content.Infrastructure: It has good Wi-Fi system with supportive faculty members. All lab facilities are available. Food in hostel is planned according to healthy habits. Classrooms are so sophisticated. Quality of food and water is also available at any time. Clubs help in enhancing your skills even during these times but the timing is little tiering.

The university offers multiple courses such as BTech, BCom, MA, MBA, etc, at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers PhD courses. To get into SASTRA University, candidates must meet the eligibility requirements that the university has set. The university offers more than 30 courses in various streams such as Science, Engineering, Management, etc. The application process at SASTRA (Deemed to be University) is conducted online. Read the following article to know more about SASTRA (Deemed to be University) course admission 2026.

faqs.question: What is the last date for SASTRA University application?
faqs.answer: SASTRA University usually concludes the application for most of its courses between April and August. Candidates who fulfil the eligibility criteria for the programme they have applied for will be shortlisted for further admission rounds followed by document verification and fee payment leading to final seat allotment.

faqs.question: Can I join SASTRA without JEE?
faqs.answer: Admission to all the BTech courses is subject to JEE Main scores and Class 12 scores(given equal weightage) for 50% of the seats and is subject to Class 12 scores for the remaining 50% of the seats. However, as per the official website, there is no fixed or specific cutoff to get a seat here. It depends on the students who score the highest marks. If a student has appeared for JEE Main then they need to apply understream 1of admission. Additionally, as per the data available on the internet, if a student has a score of 90-95% in Class 12 and 50-120 in JEE Main, there is a high possibility of getting admission.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for SASTRA University MBA?

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for B.Tech programmes offered at the SASTRA University?
faqs.answer: Candidate should have passed Class 12 with Maths Physics and Chemistry/ Bio-Technology/ Computer Science/ Biology as their subjects from any recognised Board with a minimum aggregate of 60%. The total course fee for the BTech course ranges between INR 4.7 lakhs to INR 7.7 lakhs. Spread over four years and eight semesters, admission to all these courses is subject to JEE Main scores for 70% of the seats and is subject to Class 12 scores for the remaining 30% of the seats.

faqs.question: What is the fees for BCom course at SASTRA University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fees for Bcom course is INR 70,000 every semester. In addition, the college also has some more fee components, which are given below: 1. Sports and unit test fees: INR 1,000 2. Development fee (one-time fee): INR 10,000 3. Special fees, such as medical fee, registration fee (at time of admission): INR 6,000

faqs.question: Are there any government jobs that I can seek after completing BCom at SASTRA University?
faqs.answer: Yes, SASTRA University BCom graduates can take up various job roles in the government organisations, government banks, regulatory bodies, etc. Most of these jobs require aspirants to appear for competitve entrance exams, such as UPSC, SSC, etc. Tabulated below are some of the prospective government jobs for BCom graduates of SASTRA University, along with their average salaries: Job Profile Average Salary Bank Probationary Officer (PO) INR 5 LPA to INR 7 LPA LIC AAO INR 3 LPA to INR 4 LPA IBPS Clerk INR 2 LPA to INR 3 LPA RRB NTPC INR 6 LPA to INR 8 LPA SSC CHSL INR 3 LPA to INR 4 LPA IBPS PO INR 5 LPA to INR 6 LPA Note: The above-mentioned are industry-based average payouts. The actual salary may differ from student to student based on their skills and competency.

highlights.description: SASTRA University has been continuously recognised as one of the leading institutes by numerous national ranking agencies. The institute is ranked #51 in the Overall category, #29 under University, #40 under Engineering, and #11 under Law by the NIRF 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. The article below covers all the information around SASTRA University rankings:

rankings.highlight: 8th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2025
8th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2025
11th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2025

nirf.description:
SASTRA University has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, SASTRA University fell 4 ranks to #51 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, SASTRA University fell 1 rank to #29 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a decreasing trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, SASTRA University fell 2 ranks to #40 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
Find below the latest rankings and category breakdowns from several ranking bodies.
Read less

qs_world.description:
As per the overall score, SASTRA University has been placed at a good position by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. When compared to the ranking from the previous years, it has been seen that in the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend. In 2026, SASTRA University fell 69 ranks to #419 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, SASTRA University fell 17 ranks to #108 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.

hostel.description: SASTRA University has 9 boys hostels and 6 girls hostels which are equipped with all amenities for living, dining, and recreation that makes each inmate feel at home. Wi-Fi facility is also available for students in the hostel. SASTRA has always believed in catering to the palate and providing wholesome and balanced nutrition in a hygienic environment. A completely balanced South & North Indian Vegetarian diet is served in all hostels.
facilities: Main Campus – Thirumalaisamudram, Thanjavur: Situated along the Trichy-Tanjore Road in Thirumalaisamudram, Thanjavur district.
Srinivasa Ramanujan Centre (SRC) Campus – Kumbakonam: Located in the middle of Kumbakonam, Thanjavur district.
Chennai Campus – Vadapalani: Situated on AVM Road, Vadapalani, behind AVM Theatre, in Chennai.

data: Library, Cafeteria, Recreation Rooms, Hostels, Auditorium, Research Centres, Labs, temple, Hospital/Medical services, Banking services nearby campus, etc.

library.description: The central library contains over 1,02,600 books, the library also subscribes to 290 journals and magazines related to management, engineering, law, and many more. It also subscribes to over 35 online journal databases like science direct, IEEE, ACM, ASME, and more. The library has purchased over 18,000 Springer e-books from the various subjects. The transactions of the library are fully automated and automation covers the entire gamut of the library. The library has reprographic facilities and attracts an average of over 600 students over a day.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Srinivasa Ramanujan Center, SASTRAReviewed on 23 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I like my college much because everything goes well on campus and in my department.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi labs to practice coding, a peaceful library, neat classrooms, and many more facilities were available in my department. Canteen foods were purely vegetarian and tasty, with enough food. Sports coaching was good, and indoor games were also available for a stress-free environment.

reviews.review_heading: It is a college that gives life.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is limited, as the signal is often low. The campus offers robust infrastructure, including a green campus, modern labs, a library, sports facilities, a gym, a hospital, banks, and good transport. Hostel rooms are available in 2-sharing and some 4-sharing.

reviews.review_heading: Best for students' careers.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure with the best classrooms and labs. Free Wi-Fi for only pc and laptops with some restrictions. In our hostel, there are 2 in 1, 3 in 1 and single rooms for both girls and boys, and also AC and non-AC rooms are available. 24/7, there is medical support on campus. Sports and games are there, but mainly focusing on academics only.

reviews.review_heading: It’s overhyped, but still better than other colleges in our state.
reviews.review_text: It is not up to the mark as they claim, like being a world class university. It is just average for the fees they collect from us. They can upgrade and provide a better environment for us. There is no need to change much. Just replace basic required things like benches for sitting and some basic infrastructure.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by School of Law, SASTRAReviewed on 4 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: SASTRA University life is amazing where we can meet people from various parts.
reviews.review_text: It has good Wi-Fi system with supportive faculty members. All lab facilities are available. Food in hostel is planned according to healthy habits. Classrooms are so sophisticated. Quality of food and water is also available at any time. Clubs help in enhancing your skills even during these times but the timing is little tiering.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the placements in our college last year and about the faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very well-equipped. We have a big library with hundreds of books. The building has many water purifiers for drinking water for students. The students have the facility of Wi-Fi in computer science laboratory and AC facility in laboratory.

reviews.review_heading: The college has very good infrastructure and average placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in every classroom of our college, and it is also available in the hostel rooms. Every lab is equipped with the required equipment, and the library is very large and of high quality. There are all sports grounds in the college, including volleyball, cricket, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the faculty and good placements in recent years.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities and infrastructure available for your course/department, for example- Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library. A better quality of the facilities in your hostel. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen. The college provides medical, sports, and games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I think this is the best college to enhance the future of an individual.
reviews.review_text: Classes have projectors and extraordinary batches. We have a library that consists of books related to all branches and articles. The college has a good environment. Overall, Wi-Fi is available across the campus, which can be accessed using laptops.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with decent environment
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in the hostel and college (in the library and classrooms). Classrooms consist of projectors with proper seating arrangements according to the strength of students. The library consists of study halls and at least 10,000 books. Labs are equipped with all necessary equipment.

reviews.review_heading: SASTRA (Deemed to be University)
reviews.review_text: The classrooms have suitable sitting arrangements for students and are provided with projectors. Wi-Fi is available across the campus. The library is filled with over 10,000 books and has a study hall. The labs consist of all the equipment required for academics. The mess is good, but it is a vegetarian college.

reviews.review_text: Our college is very good in infrastructure and development and our college has many facilities that are useful for students and college has a huge library which is accessible for all students and it contains thousand of books that are very useful for students .

reviews.review_heading: The college is a value for money. The college is best for placements and gives high returns.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite poor compared to other colleges, and the labs are quite good and better. As it is a Brahmin University, they do not allow you to eat non-vegetarian food within the campus. The mess food is quite average, and the medical facilities are also good.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Alluri Sitaramaraju Academy of Medical Sciences:

faqs.answer: A:    Alluri Sitaramaraju Academy of Medical Sciences provides programmes including PG Diploma, MD, MS, B.Sc, MBBS in streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Nursing, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Anaesthesia, Dermatology, ENT, Obstetrics & Gynecology, Ophthalmology, Orthopaedics, Radiology, Pathology, Biochemistry, General Medicine, Microbiology, Pediatrics, Physiology, Psychiatry, Community Medicine, Anatomy, General Surgery.

faqs.answer: A:    The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Alluri Sitaramaraju Academy of Medical Sciences is approximately INR 183600 - INR 2700000.

reviews_list.review_title: My journey in ALLURI SITA RAMA RAJU INSTITUTE OF MEDICAL SCIENCES .

review_content.Placements: There are no campus placement opportunities given by the management, but the students who study in the college achieve good grades in the post-graduation entrance examinations and secure seats in the prestigious government colleges like AIIMS and JIPMER, which is a very proudful moment for the students. The students get around 45k to 75k during the PG course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Free Wi-Fi is available all around the college. There is a 24-hour available library for the students, and the library contains all kinds of books by different authors. Infrastructure is of the best in the college; that includes classrooms, labs, hostels, as well as the library also.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Alluri Sitaramaraju Academy of Medical Sciences - My college review.

review_content.Placements: We are required to do an internship course at the end of our MBBS course, followed by an entrance exam for postgraduation.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good and comfortable, but the fee is too much. Each room has three members and shared washrooms on each floor. The college infrastructure is good, and we have access to the central library 24/7, including the reading room and a wide variety of books.
review_content.Faculty: The faculty is very good and very friendly in nature. They are constantly encouraging us to study and practice medicine. The curriculum we follow is the CBME guidelines designed by the National Medical Council. The semester exams are conducted by the University of Health Education in the state.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied for the fees and rules

review_content.Placements: Our batch have 150 members. But from 2022 onwards it was increased to 250 . No packages are offered in our college for the students . A styfund of 5000 is given to internship students which soo less compared to the fees pay and not good for the work done .
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel and college infrastructure is a bit good . Room are good . For each room 3 members are there . Labs are present of various departments like anatomy, physiology, biochemistry , pharmacology , microbiology , pathology .later follows clinical posting in different departments.

review_summary.college_name: Alluri Sitaramaraju Academy of Medical Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Anaesthesia - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities at this college.

content.Placements: This is a 2-year course. There is a good course for poor students. Students get fast placement. Good package is given. Course is really good. It provides skills and so many other activities at this college. There is 6 month internship at this college and 6 months training is also provided. It would be great, and the college is very good.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities at the college are all good. There are spacious classrooms, free Wi-Fi, and good facilities. The hospital is clean and disinfected. It is good for the students and the patients too. Washrooms are very nice, very helpful for patients and students so thank you.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: About ASAMS Medical College.

content.Placements: As it is a medical college, it does not offer placements or campus selection. After completion of this course, we have to appear for PG entrance exams. Then, according to our marks, the campus and department will be decided, but the campus provides a 1-year internship included in the course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is very good. The entire campus was recently upgraded with free Wi-Fi throughout. Classrooms are fully digitalized, fully equipped, and have nice and comfortable seating arrangements. The classrooms are fully centralized and air-conditioned. The library is very vast and has a vast book collection. The facilities in the hostel are also very good, but the fees are also very high. That's why I opted to be a day scholar. Fees for the room, electricity, and mess are paid separately. Sports and games in this college are great, with many sports to play and a vast ground, especially an excellent cricket ground.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My journey in ALLURI SITA RAMA RAJU INSTITUTE OF MEDICAL SCIENCES .

content.Placements: There are no campus placement opportunities given by the management, but the students who study in the college achieve good grades in the post-graduation entrance examinations and secure seats in the prestigious government colleges like AIIMS and JIPMER, which is a very proudful moment for the students. The students get around 45k to 75k during the PG course.
content.Infrastructure: Free Wi-Fi is available all around the college. There is a 24-hour available library for the students, and the library contains all kinds of books by different authors. Infrastructure is of the best in the college; that includes classrooms, labs, hostels, as well as the library also.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Alluri Sitaramaraju Academy of Medical Sciences - My college review.

content.Placements: We are required to do an internship course at the end of our MBBS course, followed by an entrance exam for postgraduation.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good and comfortable, but the fee is too much. Each room has three members and shared washrooms on each floor. The college infrastructure is good, and we have access to the central library 24/7, including the reading room and a wide variety of books.
content.Faculty: The faculty is very good and very friendly in nature. They are constantly encouraging us to study and practice medicine. The curriculum we follow is the CBME guidelines designed by the National Medical Council. The semester exams are conducted by the University of Health Education in the state.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied for the fees and rules

content.Placements: Our batch have 150 members. But from 2022 onwards it was increased to 250 . No packages are offered in our college for the students . A styfund of 5000 is given to internship students which soo less compared to the fees pay and not good for the work done .
content.Infrastructure: Hostel and college infrastructure is a bit good . Room are good . For each room 3 members are there . Labs are present of various departments like anatomy, physiology, biochemistry , pharmacology , microbiology , pathology .later follows clinical posting in different departments.

Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Auditorium is great. Clinical laboratories are also available. There is an operation theatre on our campus. Separate hostels are available for both girls and boys. A gym facility is also available in this college. There is a playground on our campus. A television room is also available. We also have a study room on our campus.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I would recommend students to join this college.

content.Placements: Students who scored around 80% in NEET UG are placed here. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA. Around 90% of students can complete their internships in this college.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is 22 years old with a great environment. It has a garden, a big playground, and a gym. It also provides a library.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are highly qualified like MS and MD. Weekly tests are conducted every weekend and internal exams are conducted twice a year. Pre-finals are also conducted. Dissection lectures are very good and clinically, it is very useful. Doctor degree will be given after completion of the MBBS course.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it's the worst college. It only focuses on charging fines for students for useless reasons.

content.Placements: It is one of the worst colleges. The faculty members are less, and even there is a very high fee structure. There are huge fines for paying the fee late, improper uniform, absent to college, etc. If you come to college late, they will charge you Rs. 100 to 500. There are really the worst rules to go out. Hostellers have to email frequently to get permission for an outing. Our college doesn't provide the salary or provide less salary. Even interns will get a stipend for 3 months of Rs. 2,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are bad here. They provide normal water other than mineral water, and the mess is the worst. The hostel fee is high like Rs. 80,000 per year, and we have to pay the electricity bill of nearly Rs. 3,000 per year. Here they charge commercial prices for the electricity as Rs. 12 per unit. Our college focuses on money, but it does not develop anything. Bathrooms were the worst. The campus looks great from the outside, but from the inside, it is very bad. There are bad laboratories, and they won't provide the minimum lab facilities. All the equipment is worn out and old.

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharma. in Pharmaceutics - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: A better place to excel in life.

content.Placements: Our college has partnerships with hospitals, research institutions, and pharmaceutical industries, ensuring that postgraduate students get internships in desired disciplines. Since our college excels in academics with supportive training, students get placed in top industries with good packages.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi enabled campus, well-stocked library with books and journals, free internet access in the library, well-equipped laboratories, and animal house, all assure and help students to excel in their field. Separate hostel facilities are available for girls and boys with good quality food. Affordable and tasty dishes are available in the college canteen. Sports and cultural events are conducted annually to explore our talents.

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharma. in Pharmaceutical Chemistry - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: If you are passionate about pharmacy & seek an enriching educational experience, look no further.

content.Placements: Throughout the job search process, the career services staff offered individualized support in the pharmaceutical industry. The college's solid connection with neighborhood pharmacies and medical facilities. To anyone thinking about professions in pharmacy, I heartily recommend the C. L. Baid Metha College of Pharmacy.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of C. L. Baid Metha College of Pharmacy is built to accommodate the changing demands of pharmacy research and education. Faculty and students can use the animal cabinet, well-equipped machinery rooms, and specialized software for drug development and discovery. Additionally, all the classrooms have smart board facilities and lecture hall facilities.
