reviews.review_heading: The college provides good placements, specialized lab facilities and experienced faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There are a number of labs, classes, seminar hall and auditorium available in our campus along with Wi-Fi facilities. The hostel facilities are not proper. Quality of the food available in the canteen is good. Sports and cultural events are conducted every year.

reviews.review_heading: A true phase review about the college.
reviews.review_text: Actually the college doesn't have an inside hostel but they do allocate a hostel outside / near the college. The hostel is basically good and fill the needs of an individual. About the course, the course is good choice for medical based learning which also gives us a information about pharmacy ruling over in teach field. They have multiple lab with every facilyto work with. Library is a good one but not so big. They do sports events once a year.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with rules in this college.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is small. Projectors and bathrooms are available. The canteen is small. A separate hostel is not provided in our college. Food quality is good. Sports and games are not available because the ground is not available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of C.L. Baid Metha College of Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides a hostel. We have to share a hostel with another college. Wi-Fi is not available in our college. Classrooms are huge and teachers conduct classes by using a microphone. Our college has a library. Our college does not provide sports facilities. There is no ground in our college. Our canteen is small and does not provide a variety of food items. The food served in our college is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms and labs are hot in the summer. There are projectors for teaching. There are plenty of clean toilets. A library is available. There is no ground. The campus is so small. There are no sports activities. Required equipments are available in labs. There is no separate hostel. It has been merged with the hostel of the nearby college. Food is available in the afternoon for hostel students. The food is good and costs Rs. 30. There is a water problem in the hostel. Medical facilities are...

reviews.review_heading: Truly dissatisfied with the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is the worst. No place for culturals No place for sports. Very out dated canteen with out dated foods. No places to relax in this college. Even it is medical course related college there is no medical facilities available.

reviews.review_heading: This college has good faculty, proper academic, cultural, and great experience.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are clean, spacious, and properly maintained, with a projector, speakers, and other essentials. Wi-Fi is available near the library, and the library has a large collection of books. The labs are well-equipped. The hostel is not as great as college.

reviews.review_heading: A good college but some requirements are needed.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is average. The lab, library and other facilities are good when compared to other colleges and they have separate hours for lab but this college does not contain a playground. Hostel is there but sometimes the food quality provided there is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied for the facilities offered by our college like this and library with Wi-Fi connections.
reviews.review_text: For college, infrastructure is that enough. We have this (Drug information system) with Wi-Fi facilities and Library with more reference books. But the hostel is not good. U will have lack of water facilities & u will lose the taste of your tongue. Better that u can stay in PG or u can take rooms in outside.

reviews.review_heading: Review of C.L. Baid Metha College of Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: Lab facilities seem to be good. But the hostel and sports facilities are worse. The quality of food served is average. There is no separate playground in this college and we have a separate hostel and mess in this college.

reviews.review_heading: A good review of my college
reviews.review_text: When compared to other course medicinal course is a fabulous course. There a  many laboratories , microbiology lab, library, playgrounds for both internal and outdoor games as well. College campus is surrounded my greenery . They have 2 canteens and chemical labs .

reviews.review_heading: A good college with improvement.
reviews.review_text:
College is short and precise and lab is very much good for this course lab is very important it is maintained well. 
They consider more studies than extra curricular activities. 
Food quality is medium and since it is medical course the medical facilities are nice. 
Sports and games are not provided.

individual_reviews.title: Overall, college is good, with decent infrastructure, and focuses on the academics.

content.Placements: Almost all the students will be passing their subjects. All students get internships. Many students will get selected into postgraduate courses. 70-80% of students got selected for the P. G. The current internship amount for undergrad students is 17,000.
content.Infrastructure: Colleges have decent infrastructure, including air-cooled libraries and classrooms. Labs for all subjects are available. Game facilities are available, having badminton courts, cricket grounds, volleyball courts and also indoor games. The college has its own canteen and rates are affordable. College has a total of 4 mess and food is decent. The college has its own hospital as itself is a medical college.

description: Vir Chandra Singh Garhwali Government Institute of Medical Science & Research cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Vir Chandra Singh Garhwali Government Institute of Medical Science & Research NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 26697 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Vir Chandra Singh Garhwali Government Institute of Medical Science & Research MBBS cutoff 2025 was 26697 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 26859 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Vir Chandra Singh Garhwali Government Institute of Medical Science & Research accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Vir Chandra Singh Garhwali Government Institute of Medical Science & Research NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 59842 to 80457. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Vir Chandra Singh Garhwali Government Institute of Medical Science & Research MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisations for the General AI category were MD in Pathology, followed by MD in Community Medicine. The round 4 closing ranks for these specialisations were 59842 and 80457, respectively.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

Uttarakhand NEET UG cutoff have been concluded for further admissions. The cutoff was concluded for candidates seeking admission to the UG course. Vir Chandra Singh Garhwali Government Institute of Medical Science & Research offers MBBS course at the UG level. The cutoff for all these courses was released separately for categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas.

content.Placements: American International Institute of Medical Sciences provides education and training to students in various medical fields such as medicine, nursing and allied health sciences. Overall, this institute has the best of the programs and internships to offer.

highlights.summary:
The NEET MDS 2026 application process has commenced for S.C.B. Dental College And Hospital, Cuttack admission to the MDS course, with Mar 30, 2026, being the last date to register. Also, the NEET MDS exam 2026 is going to be held on May 2, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

placements.overview: Tabulated below are the NEET MDS Online Stray Vacancy Round closing ranks for S.C.B Dental College and Hospital Cuttack cutoff 2022 for the Open category students:

faqs.answer: A:    S.C.B. Dental College And Hospital, Cuttack has been rated 4.5 on placements.
faqs.question: Does S.C.B. Dental College And Hospital, Cuttack provide good placement facilities?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: S.C.B. Dental College And Hospital, Cuttack is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as BDS. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include MDS. The fee structure for the SCB Dental College Cuttack programmes is around INR 1,05,800 to 1,76,400.

review_content.General: Our college offers a one-year compulsory internship after graduation; the college will give a whopping 42000 rupees per month. After completing their internship, they can go for a government job, tutor in dental schools or open their own clinic. But graduates should study very hard to get a placement in the government sector.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college offers all the necessary facilities required in the BDS curriculum, from dental instruments to machines. As it is a part of SCB Medical College, everything is available here. College, classrooms and hostels have Wi-Fi. There is a library, too. Hostels are pretty nice and clean, with a yearly fee of 14000 rupees. Food is average but manageable, and the canteen charges are 4000 per month. Football, cricket, badminton, and volleyball competitions are also organized by our student union.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied because the academics and faculty members are helpful.

review_content.Placements: About 70% of students get into different PG courses through OPSC recruitment and open their clinics. About 100% of them do a compulsory paid internship of one year in SCB itself. There is no limit to the amount of money you can earn. The minimum is 6 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is free WiFi. There are 9 departments, and each has classrooms and lecture theatres. There is a dental library. Practical labs are there with proper instruments. Hostels are available at a cheap cost. There are multiple messes that you can join, each of them serving the best quality food at a minimum price that every student can afford. There is a gym, a playground, a swimming pool, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: This college is one of the best dental college.

review_content.Placements: Students after completing BDS got jobs at several PHC by the government of Odisha. At various PHC the requirements of dentists are very much. The people of rural areas are much benefited from the government. The dental line is very important for their good fare and being a dentist is a very proud thing.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have an excellent hostel facility and the best canteen. Free Wi-Fi is provided everywhere. Classrooms are best with a lot of facilities. Here you can get 3 times food and share 4 beds in a room. The hostel life is good if you stay here. The library is very big and you got a lot of facilities there.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college. Its location is in a rural setup but is value for money.

review_content.Placements: Our college does not provide good placement opportunities to students. We have to do compulsory internships here for one year. The patient exposure is not that satisfying, but apart from that everything else is good. However, I do not know the payment and the placement facilities that they provide.
review_content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure is good, but people coming from other parts of India may have struggled with hostel food and accommodation. reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and facilities are very good.

review_content.Placements: 100% of students get placed here every year. Compared with other colleges SBV provides better education with lower fees. More than 90% of students get internships. Each internship member will have a posting in every department. The pre-clinical posting will be provided for all.
review_content.Infrastructure: SBV has good classroom, labs, and best library. Hostel facility is very well. SBV provides separate hostel facilities for each department's students. Mass is very well. Library has all the books and good infrastructure. A lot of indoor and outdoor games are provided.

overview_faqs.question: Is Indira Gandhi Institute of Dental Sciences a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Indira Gandhi Institute of Dental Sciences is a well-known institution for MDS, BDS courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Indira Gandhi Institute of Dental Sciences has a rating of 4.7 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.5 on campuslife, 5 on placements, 4.5 on faculty and 5 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Indira Gandhi Institute of Dental Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college. Its location is in a rural setup but is value for money.

content.Placements: Our college does not provide good placement opportunities to students. We have to do compulsory internships here for one year. The patient exposure is not that satisfying, but apart from that everything else is good. However, I do not know the payment and the placement facilities that they provide.
content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure is good, but people coming from other parts of India may have struggled with hostel food and accommodation. Other than that, everything else is good. Campus life is good. It is clean and well-maintained. The library is full of knowledgeable books and is accessible to students.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and facilities are very good.

content.Placements: 100% of students get placed here every year. Compared with other colleges SBV provides better education with lower fees. More than 90% of students get internships. Each internship member will have a posting in every department. The pre-clinical posting will be provided for all.
content.Infrastructure: SBV has good classroom, labs, and best library. Hostel facility is very well. SBV provides separate hostel facilities for each department's students. Mass is very well. Library has all the books and good infrastructure. A lot of indoor and outdoor games are provided.

admission_process.title: Indira Gandhi Institute of Dental Sciences Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Indira Gandhi Institute of Dental Sciences admission process is both merit and entrance-based, depending on the course. It offers courses at the UG and PG levels. Candidates who are selected for admission must pay the course fee to secure their seat.
The application process is conducted online. Candidates must contact the admission office for more details.

faqs.question: How much is the intake across all courses being offerred at Indira Gandhi Institute of Dental Sciences?
faqs.answer: The overall seats available across all courses offered by Indira Gandhi Institute of Dental Sciences is up to 127. Good thing to know is that Indira Gandhi Institute of Dental Sciences has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like DCI.

faqs.question: What is the cutoff for admission to MDS in Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery at Indira Gandhi Institute of Dental Sciences?
faqs.answer: The Indira Gandhi Institute of Dental Sciences cutoff 2025 has been out for MDS courses based on NEET MDS scores. Candidates having valid NEET MDS ranks will be allowed to take part in counselling rounds. Considering theIndira Gandhi Institute of Dental Sciences NEET MDS cutoff 2025for the Round 2 seat allotment results, theMDS in Oral and Maxillofacial Surgeryat the institute consistently has the highest cutoff among all branches. In the NEET MDS Round 2 seat allotmentresults, the closing rank for the General AIcategory was4996. This trend has remained unchanged over the years, making it highly competitive and solidifying its position as the most sought-after branch at the institute.
